title: Oncology Nurse
description:
Our Client:

  • High-profile customer

  • 5 days (including Saturday or Sunday)

  • 8am – 6pm

  • Stevens MRT

  • UP $7,000 + Quarterly Incentive $2,000

  • Opportunity to travel

Job Responsibilities:

  • Plan and oversee the overall well-being of a single patient, including daily health needs, comfort, safety, and coordination with family or healthcare providers.

  • Perform individualized clinical care, such as regular monitoring of glucose levels, blood pressure, vital signs, medication administration, and documentation of patient condition.

  • Manage lifestyle and dietary needs, including guiding exercise routines, supporting healthy habits, and preparing or planning appropriate dietary regimens.

  • Respond promptly to any changes in the patient’s condition, providing basic emergency care when necessary and escalating concerns to medical professionals.

  • Provide medical and physical support during overseas travel, ensuring the patient’s safety, medication management, monitoring, and preparedness throughout the entire trip.

Job Requirements:

  • Registered Nurse (RN) with valid Singapore Nursing Board (SNB) registration

  • Diploma or Degree in Nursing with a minimum of 3 years of hands-on nursing experience

  • Experience in Haematology or Cancer/Oncology (especially chemotherapy care) is highly preferred

For interested applicants, please click “Quick Apply”

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates would be notified.

By submitting your personal data and/or resume, you will be deemed to have agreed and consented to us collecting, using, retaining, and disclosing your personal information to prospective employers for their consideration.

Nurul Asilah Binti Ismail | EA Reg No: R24121710

JTE Recruit Pte Ltd | EA Lic No: 14C7215
